0: Battery — the plain account of the tests, in ordinary language. Layer 0's law: an implementation of spark is conformal when it passes the carried spark batteries; the genome names the counts. The other batteries test one lineage's forms, not the law. Each branch says what its battery checks and why it exists. The batteries are code at spark/test-battery and biome/test-battery; this block is their account — challenge either by reading.
1: spark-battery, Python, 43 checks — the law. Address parsing (one decimal, floor padding, malformed forms refused); floor discovery from the zero-spine; every read shape (point, ring, directory, disc, spindle, whole) against known blocks; every write shape, including the lift of a string into a new branch's 0; supernest invariance (a dotted address still reaches its position after the floor deepens); fold (blocks laid against the shared floor by pscale); references (name, name:address, name:address:attention — parsing and star resolution across chained blocks); and the teaching errors (a ring write refuses non-object content and names the floor-0 trap).
2: spark-battery, TypeScript, 34 checks — the same law for TS hosts. The twin must derive the same shapes from the same coordinates; fewer checks only because some parsing cases collapse in TS. An implementation in any language is kin when it passes its battery.
3: biome-battery, 16 checks — one lineage's sensing, not the law. Removable-surface detection; neighbour detection over a synthetic landscape (activated becomings, dormant genomes in both cut layouts, agent shells, self-exclusion); role resolution reading the shell at 8.8N; the federation choice when local kin are sensed.
4: serve-battery, 30 checks — one lineage's commons, not the law. Host conditions from env (a platform's injected port, a volume root); constitution-refresh against store-owned seeding (a guest-grown world is never overwritten); both doors (biome-beach serving; the legacy door signposting); the membrane (non-digit keys refused at beach and MCP doors); the hinge (a stringified whole block unwraps); the MCP handshake (instructions present, one tool, plain-terms description, teaching errors); marks round-trips.
5: mind-battery, 16 checks — one lineage's mind-form, not the law. The address form at and below the floor (above-floor positions are skipped — the open geometry item); mechanical gap-finding order (voice the headless first, seed the absent time-aspect, grow the thin); the window carries the spindle and the strict reply contract; the HTTP store membrane round-trips against a live in-process commons.
6: Standing honesty: these batteries were authored by builder instances and the steward has not yet walked them line by line. The counts are carried in the genome and updated only at a freeze. To challenge the law, read the law.
